france-oda.title: Coolness of Stone
france-oda.subtitle: Pure Luxury Before Your Eyes
france-oda.description: A spacious living area with high ceilings, built with original Alaçatı stones. A unique blend of historical texture and modern comfort.

deluxe-oda.title: Blue Sanctuary
deluxe-oda.subtitle: Cool Waters in Seconds
deluxe-oda.description: Step directly into the main pool from your private room terrace. A unique harmony of wet floor comfort and modern design.

standart-oda.title: Sky Terrace
standart-oda.subtitle: A Dream Above Alaçatı Rooftops
standart-oda.description: A private two-story loft experience overlooking the scenic rooftops of Alaçatı. Enjoy the stars on your private terrace.

twin-oda.title: Lavender Garden
twin-oda.subtitle: Rustic Elegance and Serenity
twin-oda.description: A peaceful stay experience with its large bathroom, handmade furniture, and rustic luxury details.

cumbalı-oda.title: Mastic Breeze
cumbalı-oda.subtitle: An Awakening in the Heart of Nature
cumbalı-oda.description: Wake up to the scent of mastic trees in the morning with its traditional bay window architecture and door opening to the garden.
